chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.153 of 2024 Muhammad Atiq Khan Versus Muhammad Saleem & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA 895/24 Dated: 27.11.2024 Mr. Syed Tanweer Ashraf for appellant. -.-.- In this High Court Appeal appellant has challenged order dated 14.02.2024 passed by learned Single Judge on the objections filed by the appellant in the Succession Petition filed in respect of the property left by the deceased. The controversy raised in terms of the objections to the succession petition and/or proceedings thereunder cannot be assumed in terms of the jurisdiction with the Court (Succession Court) dealing with the matter i.e. S.M.A. No.281 of 2020. In case the appellant has any issue with regard to the title of the properties left by the deceased parents or its transfer he may pursue his remedy available to him under the law, which shall be dealt with accordingly including the issue of limitation. The appeal however merits no consideration and the same is accordingly dismissed along with listed application. Chief Justice Judge
